summary: Synthetic baseline review result for deterministic structured-result comparison checks.

findings.title: Claim support is incomplete
findings.summary: The synthetic claim relies on a generic evidence packet but does not yet name the supporting sanitized label.
findings.recommendation: Add a sanitized evidence label before treating the claim as ready for caller-owned routing.

findings.title: Action boundary is explicit
findings.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
findings.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.

findings.title: Obsolete caveat remains
findings.summary: The baseline still includes a caveat for a generic source that is no longer part of the sanitized packet.
findings.recommendation: Remove stale caveats when their supporting synthetic evidence labels disappear.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: No real source paths, tracker identifiers, account data, private facts, or domain policy

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic baseline review result for deterministic structured-result comparison checks.

## Findings
- High: Claim support is incomplete.
- Low: Action boundary is explicit.
- Medium: Obsolete caveat remains.

## Boundary
This fixture uses only generic labels and leaves approval, routing, remediation, and publication policy caller-owned.
